description_long: This is a small, realistic crab with a robust, dark brown cephalothorax and a lighter, segmented abdomen. Its two prominent claws are raised, with the left claw showing a purplish hue and the right claw appearing more white, both tipped with sharp pincers. The crab's legs are spiny and jointed, splaying outward from the body and ending in pointed tips. The surface of the exoskeleton is rough and textured, with visible setae (bristles) along the legs and claws. The eyes are positioned on short stalks at the front corners of the carapace, giving the crab a wide field of view. The overall coloration includes shades of brown, purple, and white, with subtle mottling and naturalistic patterning.
description: A small, spiny crab with raised claws, a dark brown carapace, and mottled purple and white accents. Its legs are bristly and splayed, with eyes on short stalks.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the broad, dark carapace, both raised claws (left purplish, right white), and the full spread of spiny legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the crab's body depth, the curvature of the claws, and the segmentation of the abdomen beneath the carapace.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the lighter underside of the claws, the ventral side of the body, and the arrangement of the legs from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the crab's profile, the articulation of the legs, and the bristly texture along the limbs.
